per_table.name: demo

per_table.specificity_reasoning: The description provides detailed insights into the nature of adverse event reports and the specific role of each column, enhancing understanding beyond column names.
per_table.domain_inference_reasoning: The description correctly identifies the pharmacovigilance domain and uses appropriate terminology related to adverse event reporting and regulatory compliance.
